---
title: "Kader Mohideen"
description: "Cybersecurity solution architect, bridging security and AI/ML."
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      /* Home page only: soft sunrise backdrop in light mode (dark mode keeps the default field) */
      html:not([data-mode="dark"]) body{
        background:
          linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.34), rgba(255,255,255,.05)),
          url('/images/sunrise-hero.svg') center bottom / cover no-repeat fixed !important;
      }
      </style>
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/avatar.png
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kader-xai/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/kader-xai
    - text: "{{< fa brands youtube >}} YouTube"
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@kader_mohideen
    - text: "{{< fa brands hugging-face >}} Hugging Face"
      href: https://huggingface.co/kader-xai
    - text: "{{< fa brands kaggle >}} Kaggle"
      href: https://www.kaggle.com/kadermohideen9
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:pentest101@protonmail.com
    - text: "{{< fa solid file-lines >}} CV"
      href: cv.qmd
    - icon: rss
      text: RSS
      href: blog.xml
    - text: "🎓 My Teaching List"
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@kader_mohideen?courses
    - text: "{{< fa brands youtube >}} Mathematics for ML"
      href: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLIACnFYpjTsk
    - text: "{{< fa brands youtube >}} Data Science with Python"
      href: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLLnVx3dSL9Vw
    - text: "{{< fa brands youtube >}} Data Cleaning & Feature Eng."
      href: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLU3Am-JGG39I
    - text: "{{< fa brands youtube >}} Neural Network Optimization"
      href: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLR7YtqHQLLYE
    - text: "{{< fa brands youtube >}} TensorFlow from Scratch"
      href: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZ27d3oGcWmE
    - text: "{{< fa brands youtube >}} Hugging Face Transformers"
      href: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXgmP3hzUPQA
    - text: "{{< fa brands youtube >}} XGBoost for CyberDefense"
      href: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLFIEd5iwi4C8
    - text: "{{< fa brands youtube >}} AI Engineering & Graph RAG"
      href: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLdYdbdTcrIQQ
    - text: "{{< fa brands youtube >}} AI Agents with LangGraph"
      href: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQFrSnwp58Js
    - text: "{{< fa brands youtube >}} Agent Harness Engineering"
      href: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLK37H4rWLeeY
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* --- Courses section in the left about-sidebar --- */
a.about-link[href*="?courses"]{
  display:block !important; width:100%; margin:.85rem 0 .2rem; padding-top:.75rem;
  border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border, rgba(150,150,170,.40));   /* the line after RSS */
  font-weight:800; pointer-events:none; text-decoration:none !important;
}
a.about-link[href*="?courses"] .about-link-text{ color:var(--gold,#b8860b) !important; font-size:1.06rem; }
/* course links as a leaf-bulleted list */
a.about-link[href*="playlist?list="]{
  display:block !important; width:100%; text-align:left !important;
  padding:.16rem .2rem .16rem 1.5rem !important; position:relative; font-size:.92rem; line-height:1.3;
}
a.about-link[href*="playlist?list="] .about-link-text::before{
  content:"🍃"; position:absolute; left:.05rem; font-size:.82rem;
}
</style>
```

## Welcome 👋

I'm **Kader Mohideen**, a CISSP-certified cybersecurity solution architect based in **Riyadh, Saudi Arabia**, with 9+ years across the GCC/MENA enterprise market. My work sits at the intersection of deep security engineering and commercial presales — designing zero trust, DDI, and cloud security deployments for enterprise customers.

These days I'm bridging that foundation with **AI/ML and data science**. This site is where I share research notes, project write-ups, and ideas at the boundary of AI and security.

#### Areas of Focus

1. **AI in cybersecurity** — applying ML to detection, analytics, and security automation.
2. **Solution architecture** — multi-vendor stacks across DDI, zero trust, network and cloud security.
3. **Attack-Centric Framework (ACF)** — a recurring topic on the [blog](blog.qmd).
4. **Compliance & frameworks** — NIST, NCA, ISO/IEC 27001, GDPR.

Recent work: see the [blog](blog.qmd) and [projects](projects.qmd). For background and credentials, head to the [about page](about.qmd).
